cr_gateway.title: CR Gateway
cr_gateway.summary: Contractual task handover between Alpha Core and Beta Functional layers.

gen-async-jobs.title: ASYNC JOB RUNNER
gen-async-jobs.summary: Queue and retries for long jobs

agent_bus.title: Agent Bus (Z-Bus)
agent_bus.summary: Inter-agent task routing and LLM result synchronization.

chaos_engine.title: Chaos Engine
chaos_engine.summary: Core orchestration service for monitoring provider health and managing fallbacks (Z-Bus integration).

observer_relay.title: Observer Relay
observer_relay.summary: Beta-to-Gamma boundary relay. Forwards dashboard events and anomaly signals to Gamma reflective layer.

netlify_deploy_beacon.title: Netlify Deploy Beacon
netlify_deploy_beacon.summary: Reflective deploy checkpoint for Netlify publication and release state.

deploy_audit_ledger.title: Deploy Audit Ledger
deploy_audit_ledger.summary: Persistent release trail and post-deploy coherence notes.

openai_docs_hub.title: OpenAI Docs Hub
openai_docs_hub.summary: Primary documentation oracle for API/schema decisions and upgrade guidance.

gh_ci_guardian.title: GH CI Guardian
gh_ci_guardian.summary: Stabilizes GitHub workflow health and routes failing checks to correction loops.

provider_router.title: AI Provider Router
provider_router.summary: Intelligent provider selection and adapter layer (Gemini, OpenAI, Replicate).

policy_bus.title: Policy Bus
policy_bus.summary: Distributes high-level policies from Evo Meta to operational layer via Bridge.

nexus_router.title: Nexus Router
nexus_router.summary: Nexus-to-Meta boot routing and orchestration supervisor. Nexus_Boot wrapper.

gh_pr_resolver.title: GH PR Resolver
gh_pr_resolver.summary: Operational loop for addressing pull-request review comments.

resolution_stream.title: Resolution Stream
resolution_stream.summary: Routes synthesized resolutions from Chaos Engine to the Dashboard and action layers.

trinity_agent_bridge.title: ChatGPT Apps Bridge
trinity_agent_bridge.summary: Bridge layer for ChatGPT App scaffolds and runtime handoff.

audit_bridge.title: Audit Bridge
audit_bridge.summary: Reflection relay from Netlify Beacon to Deploy Audit Ledger.

sk_engine.title: SK Cognitive Engine
sk_engine.summary: Associative memory, MinHash indexing and LSH similarity search.

8-9-13.summary: Autogenerated placeholder node for autorun compatibility
